title: Verses Written On A Window Of The Inn At Carron.
content:
We came na here to view your warks
            In hopes to be mair wise,
        But only, lest we gang to hell,
            It may be nae surprise:

        For whan we tirl'd at your door,
            Your porter dought na hear us;
        Sae may, shou'd we to hell's yetts come
            Your billy Satan sair us!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Burns, titled "Verses Written On A Window Of The Inn At Carron.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
